description: Diffbot provides APIs for extracting structured data from web pages, crawling sites, querying its Knowledge Graph, and enriching entities with web data. Its products are focused on turning public web content into structured datasets and search results.
summary: Diffbot exposes a public HTTP API suite at `https://api.diffbot.com/v3` for web extraction, crawl, search/DQL, natural-language, enhance, and related operations; docs indicate authentication uses a Diffbot API token passed as a `token` query parameter.
